name: TARGET_COMBINATIONS_BY_ORIGIN_FUNCTION
description: Target combinations by origin functional category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT a.name)[0..5] AS assignees, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: For leading patents from China that involve Disease_Tissue / Cell Surface Anchors, what target-pair combinations are covered?
For leading patents from US that involve Myeloid_Growth_Factor_Axis_Target, what target-pair combinations are covered?
For leading patents from Personal that involve B_Cell_Survival_and_Differentiation_Target, what target-pair combinations are covered?
